    static class Foo_Entity_IsOutOfRange 
    {
        private static readonly global::System.Reflection.PropertyInfo _p0 = typeof(global::Foo.Entity).GetProperty("Value");

        // [Expressive]
        // public bool IsOutOfRange => Value is 0 or > 100;
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<global::Foo.Entity, bool>> Expression() 
        {
            var p__this = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::Foo.Entity), "@this");
            var expr_0 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Property(p__this, _p0); // Value
            var expr_3 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Constant(0, typeof(int)); // 0
            var expr_2 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Equal(expr_0, expr_3);
            var expr_5 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Constant(100, typeof(int)); // 100
            var expr_4 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.MakeBinary(global::System.Linq.Expressions.ExpressionType.GreaterThan, expr_0, expr_5);
            var expr_1 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.OrElse(expr_2, expr_4);
            return global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Lambda<global::System.Func<global::Foo.Entity, bool>>(expr_1, p__this);
        }
